package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_interface_map_for_typed_values: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map[string]any used for homogeneous hot-path values where typed structs avoid assertions.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule519PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario519Positive(records []Rule519PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
